form.formComment: Resuming after a break of seven months. Finished off last campaign 18th of 20 at Ascot September 6 over 1400m, 11 len behind Native Warrior carrying 60kg at $23. When resuming last campaign ran last of 7 at Newmarket (Rowley) April 16 over 1400m, 10 len behind Ten Pounds with 54.5kg at $17. May need more time.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign by 2.5 len Newmarket (Rowley) September 27 over 1400m defeating Zoulu Chief carrying 60kg at $19. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.8 len Lingfield May 29 over 1540m defeating Headmaster with 59kg at $3.30. Don't dismiss lightly.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months won by 0.5 len at Kempton Park All Weather March 18 over 1400m defeating Sarab Star with 61kg at $3.80. Previously second-up 3rd of 15 at Deauville All Weather in LR on December 3 over 1500m, 3 len behind No Lunch carrying 56.5kg at $5.50. The one they have to beat.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months 5th of 12 at Doncaster in the LR Cammidge Trophy on March 28 over 1200m, 5 len behind Aramram with 61.5kg at $19. Previously second-up won by 0.5 len at Haydock Park April 26 over 1400m defeating Gorak carrying 55kg at $4. Has won second up before and should improve on the last effort.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation fourth of 10 at Doncaster October 24 over 1400m, soft track; 2.25 len behind Rogue Diplomat with 57.5kg at $17. Previously first up; ran last in a small field at this track April 12 over 1400m, 7 len behind Paborus with 61kg at $29. Not keen on his chances.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finds a nice race to launch the campaign.

form.formComment: Resuming after a 18 months break. Finished off last campaign winning won by 1.3 len Newmarket (Rowley) September 26 2024 over 1600m defeating Present Times carrying 58kg at $2.40. On debut fifth of 10 at Goodwood September 3 2024 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Glittering Legend carrying 60.5kg at $3.50. All set for a bright return.
